nasb.text: Jesus heard that they had put him out, and finding him, He said, “Do you believe in the Son of Man?”

esv.text: Jesus heard that they had cast him out, and having found him he said, “Do you believe in the Son of Man?”

cnv.text: 耶穌聽見他們把他趕出去，後來遇見他的時候，就對他說：“你信人子嗎？”

ccb.text: 耶稣听说了这事，后来祂找到这个人，对他说：“你信上帝的儿子吗？”

csbs.text: 耶稣听说他们把他赶出去了，后来找到他，说：“你信人子吗？”
